prestazioni: Engine: EJ255 (closed-deck, forged internals with Manley I-beam connecting rods, JE 9.2:1 forged pistons, ACL Race Series bearings, and ARP head studs for 35 psi boost capability). Turbocharger: Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with 0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel, and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate for 450whp on E85.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x (side-feed) injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -10AN lines, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Fore Innovations surge tank for sustained 3G lateral fuel delivery.

Drivetrain: PPG straight-cut 1.5-way LSD for the 5-speed manual transmission, STI 2005+ rear differential with 4.44 final drive ratio, and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for 500 lb-ft torque capacity.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), custom aluminum skid plate with integrated rally jack points, and a Seibon carbon fiber hood with functional vents for the GTX3582R intercooler.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 2-way adjustable coilovers with 300mm travel, poly bushings, and spherical bearing top mounts. Front: 25mm extended wheel studs with custom camber plates. Rear: Whiteline adjustable lateral links and trailing arms for 3.5° of static camber.

Exterior: Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (7-inch, 100W H3 bulbs) with custom aluminum mounts, D-Max Type-X roof rack with integrated LED light bar (4x Rigid Industries D-Series Pro), and a custom 3M 1080 vinyl wrap in 'Subaru World Rally Blue' with matte black accents and 'Rally Raid' decals in 3M Scotchlite reflective.
